---
title: "Schedule"
toc: false
---

The table below maps each Friday to the lecture topic and materials. Click a topic to open the lecture page with slides, code, readings, and lab.

<table class="schedule">
<thead>
<tr><th>Date</th><th>Topic</th><th>Reading</th><th>Materials</th></tr>
</thead>
<tbody>

<tr>
<td>Aug 29</td>
<td><strong><a href="lectures/01-intro/index.html">Introduction</a></strong> — supervised vs.&nbsp;unsupervised; regression, classification, clustering, dimensionality reduction</td>
<td>ISLR ch. 2</td>
<td><a href="lectures/01-intro/slides.pdf">slides</a></td>
</tr>

<tr>
<td>Sep 5</td>
<td><strong><a href="lectures/02-training/index.html">Training models</a></strong> — bias-variance, training/validation/testing, resampling</td>
<td>ISLR §2.2, ch. 5</td>
<td><a href="lectures/02-training/slides.pdf">slides</a></td>
</tr>

<tr>
<td>Sep 12</td>
<td><strong><a href="lectures/03-regression-1/index.html">Regression I</a></strong> — subset selection, ridge, lasso</td>
<td>ISLR ch. 3, 6</td>
<td><a href="lectures/03-regression-1/slides.pdf">slides</a></td>
</tr>

<tr>
<td>Sep 19</td>
<td><strong><a href="lectures/04-regression-2/index.html">Regression II</a></strong> — non-linear regression, splines, kernel trick</td>
<td>ISLR ch. 7</td>
<td><a href="lectures/04-regression-2/slides.pdf">slides</a></td>
</tr>

<tr>
<td>Sep 26</td>
<td><strong><a href="lectures/05-classification-1/index.html">Classification I</a></strong> — logistic regression, generative models</td>
<td>ISLR ch. 4</td>
<td><a href="lectures/05-classification-1/slides.pdf">slides</a></td>
</tr>

<tr>
<td>Oct 3</td>
<td><strong><a href="lectures/06-classification-2/index.html">Classification II</a></strong> — support vector machines</td>
<td>ISLR ch. 9</td>
<td><a href="lectures/06-classification-2/slides.pdf">slides</a></td>
</tr>

<tr class="no-class">
<td>Oct 10</td>
<td><em>Fall break — no class</em></td>
<td>—</td>
<td>—</td>
</tr>

<tr>
<td>Oct 17</td>
<td><strong><a href="lectures/07-clustering-kmeans/index.html">Clustering I</a></strong> — k-means, cluster evaluation</td>
<td>ISLR §10.3</td>
<td><a href="lectures/07-clustering-kmeans/slides.pdf">slides</a></td>
</tr>

<tr>
<td>Oct 24</td>
<td><strong><a href="lectures/08-clustering-gmm/index.html">Clustering II</a></strong> — Gaussian mixture models</td>
<td>PRML §9.1–9.2</td>
<td><a href="lectures/08-clustering-gmm/slides.pdf">slides</a></td>
</tr>

<tr>
<td>Oct 31</td>
<td><strong><a href="lectures/09-pca/index.html">Dimensionality reduction</a></strong> — principal component analysis</td>
<td>ISLR §6.3</td>
<td><a href="lectures/09-pca/slides.pdf">slides</a></td>
</tr>

<tr class="no-class">
<td>Nov 7</td>
<td><em>No class</em></td>
<td>—</td>
<td>—</td>
</tr>

<tr>
<td>Nov 14</td>
<td><strong><a href="lectures/10-trees/index.html">Decision trees</a></strong> — CART, regression and classification trees</td>
<td>ISLR §8.1</td>
<td><a href="lectures/10-trees/slides.pdf">slides</a></td>
</tr>

<tr>
<td>Nov 21</td>
<td><strong><a href="lectures/11-ensemble/index.html">Ensemble learning</a></strong> — bagging, random forests, boosting</td>
<td>ISLR §8.2</td>
<td><a href="lectures/11-ensemble/slides.pdf">slides</a></td>
</tr>

<tr class="no-class">
<td>Nov 28</td>
<td><em>Thanksgiving — no class</em></td>
<td>—</td>
<td>—</td>
</tr>

<tr class="no-class">
<td>Dec 5</td>
<td><em>In-class final project presentations</em></td>
<td>—</td>
<td>—</td>
</tr>

</tbody>
</table>

::: {.callout-note}
**Reading codes**: *ISLR* — James, Witten, Hastie, Tibshirani, *An Introduction to Statistical Learning* (Springer, 2013). *ESL* — Hastie, Tibshirani, Friedman, *The Elements of Statistical Learning* (Springer, 2009). *PRML* — Bishop, *Pattern Recognition and Machine Learning* (Springer, 2006). *UDL* — Prince, *Understanding Deep Learning* (MIT, 2024).
:::
